title: Adding links to user profile in Monday.com?

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, I can see this as my user profile in monday.com:

image880×520 33.3 KB

I like this, but I’d also like to add, say, links to my GitHub and my StackOverflow profile.

Can I add custom text fields (which I’d use for profile links), which I can name arbitrarily, to my user profile - and if so, how?

posts.author: Vahid (Vahid Davani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi dear @sdbbs , Yes from Administration window you have to choose Customization and then click on User profile
From there you can add new custom field

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Many thanks @Vahid:

Vahid:

Yes from Administration window you have to choose Customization and then click on User profile
From there you can add new custom field

That sounds great!

Unfortunately, I cannot seem to find an “Administration” window; would you mind posting a screenshot of how it is accessed?

(It is possible I don’t have permissions to access it: in that case, a screenshot would be very useful to send to admins and ask them to add fields)

posts.author: Vahid (Vahid Davani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure
Here you go

Let me know if you have any other question
Thanks

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml: Excellent, thanks @Vahid - I could find it now and indeed, I do not have access to Administration. I have accepted this as a solution already - but would you mind editing your post and adding a screenshot of how the Customization/User Profile looks like? It would help me immensely when I ask help from admins …

a screenshot of how the Customization/User Profile looks like
